_doc.enabled: false=disabled (analyzer reports only). true=feature is armed.
_doc.mode: shadow=log intent, do not mutate engine universe. live=engine reads + adds on next restart (engine integration NOT YET WIRED — separate authorized PR).
_doc.allow_warn_tier: false=only allow-tier names are eligible for addition. true=warn-tier also eligible (use only when liquidity has been pre-verified).
_doc.max_additions_per_run: engine-side cap (when live mode is wired).
_safety_notes: shadow vs live both log; only live mutates engine state.
Engine-side hook for live mode requires a separate PR; setting mode=live without that PR is a no-op.
